stages.title: Site Analysis
stages.narration: Stage 1. Site analysis. Reinforced adobe structures are suitable for seismic regions when proper reinforcement systems are used.
stages.explanation: Reinforced adobe structures are suitable for seismic regions when proper reinforcement systems are used.

stages.title: Soil Selection
stages.narration: Stage 2. Soil selection. Suitable clay-sand proportions are identified for stabilized adobe production.
stages.explanation: Proper soil selection is critical for adobe performance.

stages.title: Adobe Brick Manufacturing
stages.narration: Stage 3. Stabilized adobe bricks are manufactured with cement and lime additives, then molded and cured.
stages.explanation: Stabilization significantly increases strength and durability.

stages.title: Setting Out
stages.narration: Stage 4. Building layout and wall centerlines are established on site.
stages.explanation: Accurate layout controls geometry and reinforcement placement.

stages.title: Excavation
stages.narration: Stage 5. Foundation trenches are excavated to competent bearing soil.
stages.explanation: Excavation creates a stable base for structural loads.

stages.title: PCC and Footings
stages.narration: Stage 6. PCC blinding and reinforced concrete footings are constructed.
stages.explanation: Footings safely transfer loads into the soil.

stages.title: Plinth Band
stages.narration: Stage 7. The reinforced concrete plinth band is cast to tie the structure together.
stages.explanation: The plinth band ties the entire structure together.

stages.title: Adobe Wall Construction
stages.narration: Stage 8. Stabilized adobe bricks are laid course by course to form load-bearing walls.
stages.explanation: Adobe walls provide gravity load support and thermal mass.

stages.title: Vertical Reinforcement
stages.narration: Stage 9. Vertical steel bars are inserted and anchored into the plinth band.

stages.title: Wire Mesh Installation
stages.narration: Stage 10. Wire mesh reinforcement is now being installed. This mesh distributes stresses, controls cracking and significantly improves earthquake performance.
stages.explanation: Wire mesh improves wall integrity and controls cracking.

stages.title: Window and Door Openings
stages.narration: Stage 11. Door and window frames are installed with additional opening reinforcement.
stages.explanation: Openings require additional reinforcement because they interrupt load paths.

stages.title: Lintel Band
stages.narration: Stage 12. The continuous lintel band is cast to tie walls at opening level.
stages.explanation: Lintel bands tie walls together and improve earthquake performance.

stages.title: Roof Band
stages.narration: Stage 13. The roof-level ring beam is cast to complete the box action system.
stages.explanation: Roof bands create box action behavior.

stages.title: Lightweight Roof System
stages.narration: Stage 14. Lightweight timber trusses and CGI sheeting are installed.
stages.explanation: Lightweight roofs reduce seismic forces acting on adobe walls.

stages.title: Protective Plaster
stages.narration: Stage 15. Protective plaster and waterproof coating are applied to the adobe walls.
stages.explanation: Adobe requires protection from moisture and weathering.

stages.title: Completed Structure
stages.narration: Construction complete. Reinforcement transforms brittle adobe into a resilient seismic structure suitable for mountain and arid regions.
stages.explanation: Completed reinforced adobe house ready for occupancy.

adobe_brick.title: Stabilized Adobe Brick
adobe_brick.materialProperties: Cement or lime stabilized earthen unit with improved compressive strength.
adobe_brick.thermalMass: High thermal mass moderates indoor temperature swings.

wire_mesh.title: Wire Mesh Reinforcement
wire_mesh.crackControl: Distributes tensile stresses and limits crack propagation.
wire_mesh.seismicResistance: Improves wall ductility and out-of-plane stability.

vertical_reinforcement.title: Vertical Reinforcement
vertical_reinforcement.loadTransfer: Anchored to plinth band and connects to upper bands.
vertical_reinforcement.earthquakeResistance: Provides tensile capacity against lateral shaking.

plinth_band.title: RCC Plinth Band
plinth_band.structuralContinuity: Ties wall bases and distributes settlement effects.

lintel_band.title: RCC Lintel Band
lintel_band.wallIntegration: Continuous tie beam integrates walls above openings.

roof_band.title: RCC Roof Band
roof_band.boxAction: Ring beam completes box action for lateral load resistance.
